title: kpod stop and kpod kill
body:
Adds backend code to kill and stop containers, then wires this into kpod kill and kpod stop. Also fixes kpod rm -f

Tests are still pending, need kpod ps to merge to get them working. Also want to write some unit tests for the backend code.

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably b1a3b03) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
:clipboard: Looks like this PR is still in progress, ignoring approval
Added tests, plus made runtime.Shutdown() stop containers
Tests probably still not passing, but getting close. Think I understand what's going wrong
In theory, tests should be passing now. Probably needs some fresh reviews because it required a lot of code to do.

:pushpin: Commit 706df62 has been approved by `rhatdan`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
